---
title: "Experiment log"
---

The lab notebook. Each experiment states a **question**, a **method**, and a
**finding**, and is fully reproducible from the repo (`uv run lab ingest && uv run lab panel`,
then render). Numbering is chronological.

| # | Experiment | Question |
|---|---|---|
| 001 | [Descriptive baseline](001-descriptive-baseline.qmd) | What does the market look like — size, mix, concentration, seasonality? |
| 002 | [EV diffusion across states](002-ev-diffusion-states.qmd) | Do EV adoption curves follow Bass dynamics, and what differentiates fast states? |
| 003 | [OEM–state network evolution](003-oem-state-network.qmd) | How has the market's network topology shifted across BS6 / COVID / EV eras? |
| 004 | [Wholesale vs retail nowcast](004-wholesale-retail-nowcast.qmd) | Can dispatches nowcast registrations? What's the channel-inventory structure? *(needs local wholesale data)* |
| 005 | [Phase transitions](005-phase-transitions.qmd) | Does the market change gradually or snap? Percolation of the OEM–state network + fuel-regime Markov dynamics. |
| 006 | [EV tipping points](006-ev-threshold.qmd) | Is there a share level where EV adoption self-accelerates — or does growth bend down (saturation)? |

Background, concepts and math for every experiment: **[Experiment Guide](guide.qmd)**.

**Add an experiment**: copy `_template.qmd`, number it, commit — CI renders it here.
